_meta.definition: The set of activities related to managing customer accounts and associated store information.

columns.name: customer_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in customer

columns.name: store_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the store_ entity

columns.name: first_name
columns.description: Stores up to 50 characters of a customer's given name, typically female, as indicated by sample values.

columns.name: last_name
columns.description: Stores up to 50 characters of a customer's surname.

columns.name: email
columns.description: Stores customer email addresses in a Sakila database, following the format of [first_name].[last_name]@sakilacustomer.org.

columns.name: address_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the address_ entity

columns.name: active
columns.description: Stores whether a customer account is currently active (1 indicates active).

columns.name: create_date
columns.description: Stores the date and time when a customer account was created (in YYYY-MM-DD HH:MI:SS format).

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: Stores the timestamp of the last update for each customer record.

columns.name: store_id
columns.description: Primary key uniquely identifying each row in store

columns.name: manager_staff_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the manager_staff_ entity

columns.name: address_id
columns.description: Foreign key linking to the address_ entity

columns.name: last_update
columns.description: The "last_update" column stores timestamp data representing the last modification time for store records.
